statement: Communication date update — Updating/adding communication date recalculates linked task dates dynamically. It should not be — Date resolver, version update logic, timeline refresh, save
affected_modules: src/types/; src/services/api-mappers.ts; src/utils/date.helpers.ts; src/utils/node.helpers.ts; DTO/domain/builder mapping
ux_impact: User changes one date and sees linked schedule
